name: Vino - Liqouri
address: Via Alberto Mario 23, 37121 Verona, Italy
notes: Tiny back-street wine bar just off the Arena/Teatro: local-feeling, atmospheric, and best for aperitivo or a late drink. Reviewers rate the Americano, wine/beer/cocktails and croquettes; seating is tight.
